results.rendered_html:
pari-cchid (√chid; inf. -cchettum ind.p. -cchidya),
to cut on both sides, clip round, cut through or off or to pieces, mutilate,  ŚBr. ;  Lāṭy. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to mow or reap (corn),  Kāraṇḍ. ;
to limit on all sides, define or fix accurately, discriminate, decide, determine,  Kāv. ;  Pañc. ;  Pur. ;
to separate, divide, part,  Siddh. ;
to avert, obviate,  MW.

results.rendered_html:
paricchid 7 U.
1 To tear, cut off, tear to pieces.
2 To wound, mutilate.
3 To separate, divide, part; śatena paricchidya  Sk. 
4 To fix accurately, set limits to, define, decide, distinguish or discriminate; madhyasthā bhagavatī nau guṇadoṣataḥ paricchettumarhati  M. 1 ; (na) yaśaḥ paricchettumiyattayālaṃ  R. 6. 77 ; 17. 59 ;  Ku. 2. 58. 
5 To avert, obviate, remedy.
